scripts.test:user:blackbox: newman run "postman/VGA-AUTH-USER/VGA-Store-USER/VGA Store User Blackbox.postman_collection.json" -e "postman/env/VGA_Store_Environment.postman_environment.json" -d "postman/VGA-AUTH-USER/VGA-Store-USER/VGA-Store-User-Blackbox-Testcase.csv" --reporters cli,json --reporter-json-export "reports/user-blackbox-newman.json"
scripts.test:product-admin:blackbox: newman run "postman/VGA-store-product/product-admin/VGA Store Product Admin Blackbox.postman_collection.json" -e "postman/env/VGA_Store_Environment.postman_environment.json" -d "postman/VGA-store-product/product-admin/VGA-Store-Product-Admin-Testcase.csv" --reporters cli,json --reporter-json-export "reports/product-admin-blackbox-newman.json"
scripts.test:admin:blackbox: newman run "postman/VGA-Store-Admin/VGA Store Admin Blackbox.postman_collection.json" -e "postman/env/VGA_Store_Environment.postman_environment.json" --reporters cli,json --reporter-json-export "reports/admin-blackbox-newman.json"
scripts.test:product:blackbox: newman run "postman/VGA-store-product/product-user/VGA Store Product User.postman_collection.json" -e "postman/env/VGA_Store_Environment.postman_environment.json" --folder "Products User" --reporters cli,json --reporter-json-export "reports/products-user-blackbox-newman.json" && newman run "postman/VGA-store-product/product-user/VGA Store Product User.postman_collection.json" -e "postman/env/VGA_Store_Environment.postman_environment.json" -d "postman/VGA-store-product/product-user/PRODUCT_USER_BVA.csv" --folder "Products User" --reporters cli,json --reporter-json-export "reports/products-user-bva-newman.json"
